title.en: When they found out about the situation in the ...

content.en:
"This is it!"

Ye Tian stood in the Death Realm in this area, and then urged the Eternal Decree.

Airplanes!!!!!

The Eternal National Decree emitted a wisp of fluctuations, gradually spreading, covering an incomparably large area, and Ye Tian's will also covered this area with the Eternal National Decree, and the position could also be adjusted, at least it could not overlap with the Longyan Realm, nor could it be too far away, just bordering it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to adjust his position, and the adjustment was completed after a while.

"Here we go!"

As Ye Tianyi thought about it, the Eternal Decree began to lead to the origin of the Eternal Realm, opening up the Eternal Realm here.

"Eternal Kingdom, Open !!!!"

In an instant, the earth and space in this area began to change, countless energies emerged, treasure lands emerged, many resources grew rapidly, and those death energies were all driven away.

The opening up of the eternal kingdom is very much at stake, and it is impossible to hide it.

For the first time, many of the Eternal Dao Realms in the Dragon Yan Realm noticed it, especially the nearby Eternal Dao Realms, which shuttled over one after another.

When they found out about the situation in the death zone, they were shocked.

"This is opening up the eternal kingdom!"

"How many years have there been 173 years to open up the eternal realm, it's been too long, and finally there is an eternal realm to open up the eternal realm here!"

"Who is this guy?"

"I can't perceive it, and in the process of opening up the eternal realm, I can't snoop into it at all, and I can't even go in!"

"When it is carved out, we will know!"

Soon.

The Dragon Flame Realm Lord also came here.

"Who is this opening up the Eternal Kingdom? I didn't expect that not long after the collapse of an Eternal Kingdom, another Eternal Kingdom was born!"

The Dragon Yan Nation Lord muttered.

A new eternal kingdom can be more valuable than an old eternal kingdom, like many eternal kingdoms have existed for countless years, many resources have been mined, and it is difficult to breed new resources, in fact, the value is not high.

The New Eternal Realm is different, it is very valuable, and there are unknown resources and treasures.

Nine Extremes Void.

Many Eternal Dao Realms were also discussing, wondering who had obtained an Eternal Decree and was opening up the Eternal Realm.

Then, no one knows, after all, whoever obtains the eternal kingdom will hide it and will not be exposed!

"Could it be Ye Tian, he bought an Eternal Dao Boundary Stone at the trade fair last time (CFBD), maybe he found an Eternal Decree in the Eternal Country!"

"Ye Tian, his strength is not enough to break through in the Eternal Dao Realm, so he may not use it. "

"I'll ask!"

Some Eternal Dao Realms contacted Ye Tian and asked if Ye Tian was opening up the Eternal Realm.

Ye Tian received a lot of summons from the Eternal Dao Realm, and he didn't hide it.

"Yes, I'm opening up the Eternal Realm!"

Ye Tian responded.

This response made this group of Eternal Dao Realms envious.

"It's really Ye Tian who is opening up the Eternal Realm, this luck is so good, you can become an Eternal Realm Lord immediately!"

After learning that Ye Tian was opening up the Eternal Realm, many Eternal Dao Realms were contacting Ye Tian and wanted to move into Ye Tian's Eternal Realm.

According to the rules for the opening of the Eternal Realm, after the opening up is successful, within the range of the 100 million Eternal Dao Era, without Ye Tian's permission, it will be difficult for other Eternal Dao Realms to enter the Eternal Realm, and there will be a barrier to protect the Eternal Realm.

It wasn't until after the 100 million Dao Era that it could be fully opened.

Therefore, many forces want to relocate their forces to the Eternal Realm within the range of 100 million Eternal Dao Eras.

Other than that.

According to the order of the kingdom of all gods, the nearby new eternal kingdom must divide eighty percent of its territory and give it to other forces, and no one force can occupy all the territory of the eternal kingdom, unless the strength is stronger than the lord of the great kingdom of all gods.

These forces all wanted to relocate to the Eternal Realm, and Ye Tian naturally wouldn't agree.

He replied directly that he would talk about it later, and he thought that he would do his best to open up the eternal kingdom, so he would not reply again.

......

The eternal realm opened up by Ye Tian is gradually about to be completely opened up.

Rumble!!!!!

The Eternal Kingdom was successfully opened, and a shield protected the entire Eternal Kingdom.

And now, the resources of the Eternal Kingdom are in the process of being conceived, and it will take some years before they can be conceived one after another.

"The Eternal Realm has been opened, and a group of humans must be sent over!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Human domain.

A group of Terran powerhouses have gathered here, Ye Tian has already ordered them to come over, and Ye Xingchen and them will do it, these human beings have all voluntarily left the human realm, and they have all made an oath.

There are millions of human beings in this group, and the reason why so many Eternal Dao Realms are willing to leave the Void Realm is mainly because Ye Tian promised that they would all be able to step into the Elder Level in the future.

In the Eternal Realm, the Mythical Dao Realm is undoubtedly very ordinary, but in the Void Realm, that is the top powerhouse, and they are naturally willing to leave.

Of course.

It's not that they don't have a chance to come back, they still have a chance to come back, they just need to contribute big enough, and if they break through to the Eternal Dao Realm, there is still a way to come back, but if they come back, they are not allowed to go out.

Unless Ye Tian's strength surpassed the Eternal Dao Realm, he would completely let go of the passage between the Void Realm and the Eternal Realm, and even open up the passage to reach his Eternal Realm.

"Father, all the Terrans who are going to the Eternal Kingdom are ready!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"Let's go together!"

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, Ye Tian used a space-type Eternal Primordial Treasure to pack all these human races into it, and then entered the Eternal Realm from the Mythical Valley.

After that, he traveled in the Death Zone to the eternal kingdom he had opened.

During this period, he ignored the other forces, he must have let the human race develop his own eternal kingdom first, collect some resources, and strengthen the human race!

"100 million to the Dao Era, it should be possible for this group of human races to raise their strength to the Mythical Dao Realm, and the best should be able to be promoted to the Eternal Dao realm, and the real demons may be able to break through to the Eternal Dao realm. "

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

Soon.

His eternal kingdom has arrived.

At this time.

There was not a single building in this eternal kingdom, so Ye Tian helped build several giant cities, and the rest was up to them.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian began to wander around this eternal country, and collected very good resources when he came across, but the time was limited, and most of the resources here were not bred.

"There's an eternal primordial treasure in the making, mark it down, and take it away later!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And in order for the Eternal Kingdom to communicate with other Eternal Kingdoms in the future, he also had to name the Eternal Kingdom.

"Let's call it the Endless Realm!"

Ye Tian named the road.
